text:
Now I have the data model. Let me execute this in one program:

1. Fetch all merged PRs
2. Fetch all Linear issues (non-done states)
3. Join on `closes_linear` to find PRs closing issues that are NOT "done"

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":";; Step 1: Get all merged PRs (store in REPL for reuse)
(def merged-prs (github__list_pull_requests {:state "merged"}))

;; Step 2: Get all Linear issues (not filtered by state so we can check all)
(def all-issues (linear__list_issues {}))

;; Step 3: Build a map from issue ID -> state for quick lookup
(def issue-state-by-id (into {} (map (fn [i] [(:id i) (:state i)]) all-issues)…(+654)
